title: ajuga flaccida
intro: Ajuga flaccida, also known as Chinese bugleweed or small bugle, is a perennial plant species native to China, belonging to the mint family Lamiaceae. The plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects, which are attributed to its active compounds such as ajugan and ajugol. The health benefits of Ajuga flaccida include its ability to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and reduce anxiety. Ajuga flaccida is commonly prepared as a tea or infusion, and it can also be found in capsule or tincture form, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety for human consumption.
